page_metadata.bioconda__summary: SSAKE is a genomics application for de novo assembly of millions of very short DNA sequences.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A program for assemblying short dna sequences. the program cycles through sequence data stored in a hash table and progressively searches through a prefix tree for the longest possible k-mer between any two sequencis.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A program for assemblying short DNA sequences. The program cycles through sequence data stored in a hash table and progressively searches through a prefix tree for the longest possible k-mer between any two sequencis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A program for assemblying short DNA sequences. The program cycles through sequence data stored in a hash table and progressively searches through a prefix tree for the longest possible k-mer between any two sequencis.
